form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (34.89) at Dubbo in a NG, finishing fourth and beaten 1.3 lengths. Has three wins and six placings from 10 starts from the draw. Can feature in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Richmond over 401m in 22.87 last start, beating Global Tracker. In winning form now and looks a major threat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Richmond over 401m in 22.87 last start, beating Global Tracker. In winning form now and looks a major threat.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (24.98) at Maitland over 450m. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time despite being beaten. Follow up.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (30.33) over 516m at Dubbo. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 520m at this track. Other runners look much more appealing.

form.formComment: Won again in another strong performance after leading notching his three straight wins at Richmond over 520m (29.66). With a clean break will feature again.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 400m at Bulli in a handy (22.52), beating Magic Linkin. In form and expected to run well again.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 520m at Richmond behind Raymar Shame beaten 11 lengths (30.74). Has a fast 29.85 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.
